channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Final Fantasy creator Hironobu Sakaguchi praises AI-generated FF6 remake teaser, is promptly told "please stop" by SaGa's Akitoshi Kawazu - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Final Fantasy creator Hironobu Sakaguchi praises AI-generated FF6 remake teaser, is promptly told "please stop" by SaGa's Akitoshi Kawazu  Eurogamer
  2. "That's Amazing!" - Final Fantasy Creator Approves Of FF6 Video Created By AI  Nintendo Life
  3. Final Fantasy creator Hironobu Sakaguchi responds to the backlash after shouting out a Final Fantasy 6 AI mock-up that went viral for all the wrong reasons  GamesRadar+
  4. Final Fantasy creator Sakaguchi praises AI slop trailer for a FF6 remake, earns himself a light ribbing from battle designer on the first 2 games  PC Gamer
  5. 'Pretty Awesome, Huh?': Even the Father of Final Fantasy Can't Avoid AI Drama  Push Square

item.title: Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons - The Verge
item.description:
1. Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons  The Verge
  2. Gradient Google icon redesign rolling out on Android, iOS, & web  9to5Google
  3. Google's Much-Improved App Icons Are Rolling Out Now  Engadget
  4. Google's new gradient icons for Gmail, Calendar, Drive and more are finally rolling out  Android Central
  5. Google's redesigned app icons are rolling out, whether you want them or not  Android Authority

item.title: The iPhone and Mac security Apple spent 5 years building? AI broke it in 5 days. - Cult of Mac
item.description:
1. The iPhone and Mac security Apple spent 5 years building? AI broke it in 5 days.  Cult of Mac
  2. Apple’s Security Has Been Tough to Crack. Mythos Helped Find a Way In.  WSJ
  3. Researchers Claim Anthropic's Mythos Helped Crack macOS Security  PCMag
  4. First Apple M5 memory exploit discovered using Anthropic AI, gives root access on MacOS — Claude Mythos helps security researchers bypass Memory Integrity Enforcement  Tom's Hardware
  5. Security Researchers, Aided By Anthropic's Mythos, Claim To Have Breached macOS  Engadget

item.title: Qualcomm confirms a Snapdragon-powered Googlebook will launch this fall - Chrome Unboxed
item.description:
1. Qualcomm confirms a Snapdragon-powered Googlebook will launch this fall  Chrome Unboxed

  3. Googlebooks are not Google books  NBC News
  4. The Original Chromebook Dream Is Dead. Googlebooks Killed It  PCMag
  5. Googlebook Is Google’s New AI-Powered Laptop Platform Built on Android  WIRED

item.title: Someone Shoved Cameras Into Sony Earbuds, and Now They’re Basically Smart Glasses - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. Someone Shoved Cameras Into Sony Earbuds, and Now They’re Basically Smart Glasses  Gizmodo
  2. Forget smart glasses: UW researchers put tiny cameras into earbuds for hands-free AI  GeekWire
  3. AirPods Ultra: Release Date, Price, Specs, Rumors, and More  Headphonesty
  4. Why Apple is Putting Cameras in the New AirPods Pro 4 (Ultra)  Geeky Gadgets
  5. VueBuds are Camera-Equipped Sony WF-1000XM3 Wireless Earbuds That Can See the World Around You  TechEBlog -
